    <sys_variable_value action="delete_multiple" query="document_key=0416e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcba9"/>

        <document>sys_atf_step</document>

    <sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
        <document>sys_atf_step</document>
        <document_key>0416e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcba9</document_key>
        <order>200</order>
        <sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name>
        <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
        <sys_created_on>2020-11-12 12:39:35</sys_created_on>
        <sys_id>cc16e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcba9</sys_id>
        <sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count>
        <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
        <sys_updated_on>2020-11-12 13:11:30</sys_updated_on>
        <value>var strLog = '';
function Log(strText)
{
	strLog = strLog + "\n" + strText;
}
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual)
{
	var bResult = true;
	
	function TestCase_IsUserSecurityAdmin(vExpected)
	{
		Log('TestCase_IsUserSecurityAdmin');
		Log('Expected: '+vExpected);
		var vResult = IsUserSecurityAdmin();
		Log('Result  : '+vResult);
		if (vResult != vExpected)
		{
			bResult = false;
			Log('Test case FAILED');
		}
		Log('');
	}

	TestCase_IsUserSecurityAdmin(false);
	
	stepResult.setOutputMessage(strLog);
	return bResult;
	
})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);</value>
        <variable display_value="Test script">989d9e235324220002c6435723dc3484</variable>
    </sys_variable_value>
</record_update>
